mission_title: Repair Bay V1.1 — Diagnostic Accuracy and Launcher Inventory

validations.name: Compile Repair Bay V1.1 diagnostic and verifier
Verify diagnostic accuracy, read-only behavior, and launcher classification
validations.stdout:
{
  "ok": true,
  "schema": "foxai.repair_bay.v1_1.verification",
  "quick_checks": 13,
  "full_checks": 18,
  "healthy_guidance_corrected": true,
  "empty_init_recognized_as_valid": true,
  "rename_only_restart_marker_informational": true,
  "confirmed_update_restart_recommended": true,
  "launcher_inventory_categories_verified": true,
  "launcher_exact_duplicates_verified": 1,
  "launcher_similar_families_verified": 1,
  "broken_fixture_urgent": 1,
  "broken_fixture_recommended": 4,
  "read_only_tree_unchanged": true,
  "network_used": false,
  "commands_run": false,
  "repairs_applied": 0
}

argv: import json,sys;sys.path.insert(0,r'Z:\FOXAI');from core.repair_bay_diagnostics import run_repair_bay_scan;r=run_repair_bay_scan(r'Z:\FOXAI',mode='full',context={'validation':'v1_1_live_accuracy_smoke'});s=r.get('safety') or {};assert r.get('version')=='1.1',r.get('version');assert r.get('read_only') is True,r;assert s.get('network_used') is False,s;assert s.get('commands_run') is False,s;assert int(s.get('files_written') or 0)==0,s;assert int(s.get('repairs_applied') or 0)==0,s;assert all(f.get('suggested_action')=='No action required.' for f in r.get('findings',[]) if f.get('severity')=='healthy');zf=next(f for f in r['findings'] if f.get('id')=='zero_byte_live_files');assert not any('Suspicious: core/__init__.py' in x for x in zf.get('evidence',[])),zf;inv=(r.get('evidence') or {}).get('launcher_inventory') or {};assert int(inv.get('total') or 0)>=1,inv;rf=next((f for f in r['findings'] if f.get('id')=='pending_reboot'),None);pr=(r.get('evidence') or {}).get('pending_reboot') or {};assert rf is None or ((bool(pr.get('confirmed_signals')) and rf.get('severity')=='recommended') or (not bool(pr.get('confirmed_signals')) and bool(pr.get('advisory_signals')) and rf.get('severity')=='informational') or (not bool(pr.get('confirmed_signals')) and not bool(pr.get('advisory_signals')) and rf.get('severity')=='healthy'));print(json.dumps({'REPAIR_BAY_V1_1_LIVE_OK':True,'checks':(r.get('summary') or {}).get('checks'),'counts':(r.get('summary') or {}).get('counts'),'launcher_total':inv.get('total'),'restart_severity':None if rf is None else rf.get('severity')},indent=2))
validations.name: Run live full-scan V1.1 accuracy and safety smoke test
